widgets_values: Increase the shift if you get too many blury/dark/bad images. Decrease if you want to try increasing detail.

nodes.title: SNEAKY ROBOT QWEN SEGMENT IMAGE EDIT

widgets_values:
Set cfg to 1.0 for a speed boost at the cost of consistency. Samplers like res_multistep work pretty well at cfg 1.0

The official number of steps is 50 but I think that's too much. Even just 10 steps seems to work.
a woman with yellow and green sun glasses
